name: Pineapple Cheese Mold (Sugarless)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Crushed Pineapple in its own juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello in boiling water and stir in cold water. Refrigerate until syrupy.
2. Combine all ingredients except crushed pineapple in a bowl, blending well until smooth.
3. Add the crushed pineapple to the gelatin mixture.
4. Pour into a mold or pan or cups.
5. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
